notes: Overleaf Toolkit lib/config-seed/version is 6.2.0 and Community Edition resolves to sharelatex/sharelatex:<version>.
Toolkit quick start uses sharelatex, MongoDB, and Redis services and creates the first admin account at /launchpad.
Toolkit enables MongoDB with --replSet overleaf for Overleaf 4+; this adaptation initializes the replica set in the MongoDB healthcheck so 1Panel's restart policy does not block service startup.
Internal MongoDB and Redis service names are app-prefixed to avoid Docker DNS collisions when the main service also joins 1panel-network.
Community Edition does not support sibling containers; this appstore adaptation leaves Server Pro, Git Bridge, TLS proxy, and Docker socket based sandboxed compiles disabled.
Docker image manifest/config inspection shows sharelatex/sharelatex:6.2.0 is linux/amd64, so the app metadata is restricted to amd64.
